channel.title: London Property Demo Feed
channel.description: Demo XML feed for a London estate agency property catalogue, aligned with sales and lettings journeys.

item.g:title: Two-bedroom apartment near Clapham Common
item.g:description: Apartment in Clapham with a London-focused property search experience. Demo listing inspired by estate agency sales and lettings journeys.

item.g:description: Terraced house in East Dulwich with a London-focused property search experience. Demo listing inspired by estate agency sales and lettings journeys.
